context.projectOverview: Sprint 8 implements the first real Checkpoint mechanism: CLI blocking with stdin/EDITOR + TTY fallback to noop. Plugs into the registry created in Sprint 7. Must NOT change pipeline default behavior (noop stays default until Sprint 14 mode/mechanism config).

completedSprints.title: Checkpoint abstraction + 9 call-site wiring (noop)
completedSprints.summary: src/orchestrator/checkpoints/{types,registry,noop,sites,index,checkpoints.test}.ts in place; pipeline.ts wired with +10/-0 LOC; noop self-registered at module load

notes: COLOCATION HARD CONSTRAINT — the contract's expectedChanges says tests/orchestrator/checkpoints/cli.test.ts but Sprint 5 scanner regression precedent + Sprint 7 colocation precedent make that location WRONG. Test MUST land at src/orchestrator/checkpoints/mechanisms/cli.test.ts (alongside cli.ts). Adding 1 file to tests/ would tip colocated:separate ratio (currently 24:22 per scanner). Briefing has the full implementation plan.
